changes.value:
Create a new generic, consumer-agnostic `swissarmyhammer-views` crate following the same pattern as `swissarmyhammer-fields`.

## Key files
- `swissarmyhammer-views/Cargo.toml` — workspace crate, deps: serde, serde_yaml, tracing, ulid
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/lib.rs` — pub mod types, context, error
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/types.rs` — ViewDef, ViewId, ViewKind enum
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/context.rs` — ViewsContext with from_yaml_sources(), name/id indexes
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/error.rs` — ViewsError, Result type alias

## ViewDef type
```rust
struct ViewDef {
    id: ViewId,          // ULID — stable identity
    name: String,        // Human-facing name
    icon: Option<String>, // Lucide icon name
    kind: ViewKind,      // Grid | Board
    entity_type: String, // Which entity type this view shows
    commands: Vec<String>, // Command IDs to register on mount
}
```

## ViewsContext
- `from_yaml_sources(writable_root, &[(&str, &str)])` — parse YAML, build name+id indexes, later entries override earlier (same merge semantics as FieldsContext)
- `get_view_by_name()`, `get_view_by_id()`, `all_views()`
- `load_yaml_dir()` — reuse pattern from swissarmyhammer-fields

## Checklist
- [ ] Create Cargo.toml with workspace deps
- [ ] Add to workspace Cargo.toml members
- [ ] Implement ViewDef, ViewId, ViewKind types with serde
- [ ] Implement ViewsContext with from_yaml_sources()
- [ ] Implement error types
- [ ] Write tests: YAML parsing, override merge, name/id lookup, invalid YAML skipping
- [ ] cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-views passes

#phase2-views
\ No newline at end of file
+Create a new generic, consumer-agnostic `swissarmyhammer-views` crate following the same pattern as `swissarmyhammer-fields` but with full CRUD and changelog.

Views are **mutable** — users can create, modify, and delete them. Changes are logged with whole-view snapshot undo/redo.

## Key files
- `swissarmyhammer-views/Cargo.toml` — workspace crate, deps: serde, serde_yaml, serde_json, tracing, ulid, chrono, tokio, thiserror
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/lib.rs` — pub mod types, context, changelog, error
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/types.rs` — ViewDef, ViewId, ViewKind
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/context.rs` — ViewsContext with read/write/delete/list + from_yaml_sources()
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/changelog.rs` — ViewChangeEntry with whole-view snapshots, JSONL, undo/redo
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/error.rs` — ViewsError, Result type alias

## ViewDef type
```rust
struct ViewDef {
    id: ViewId,              // ULID
    name: String,            // Human-facing
    icon: Option<String>,    // Lucide icon name
    kind: ViewKind,          // Grid | Board
    entity_type: String,     // Which entity type this view shows
    card_fields: Vec<String>, // Fields to show on cards (board) or columns (grid)
    commands: Vec<String>,   // Command IDs to register on mount
}
```

## ViewsContext
- `from_yaml_sources(writable_root, &[(&str, &str)])` — parse YAML, build name+id indexes
- `get_view_by_name()`, `get_view_by_id()`, `all_views()`
- `write_view(def)` — write YAML to disk, update indexes, append changelog (whole-view snapshot)
- `delete_view(id)` — remove file, update indexes, append changelog
- `undo(entry_id)` / `redo(entry_id)` — replay snapshots

## Changelog
Append-only JSONL per view. Each entry stores op + whole ViewDef as previous/current:
```jsonl
{"id":"...","op":"create","view_id":"...","previous":null,"current":{...}}
{"id":"...","op":"update","view_id":"...","previous":{...},"current":{...}}
```

## Checklist
- [ ] Create Cargo.toml with workspace deps
- [ ] Add to workspace Cargo.toml members
- [ ] Implement ViewDef, ViewId, ViewKind types with serde
- [ ] Implement ViewsContext with from_yaml_sources() and CRUD
- [ ] Implement ViewChangeEntry changelog with JSONL append/read
- [ ] Implement undo/redo via snapshot replay
- [ ] Implement error types
- [ ] Write tests: YAML parsing, write/delete round-trip, changelog, undo/redo, override merge
- [ ] cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-views passes

#phase2-views
\ No newline at end of file
+Create a new generic, consumer-agnostic `swissarmyhammer-views` crate following the same pattern as `swissarmyhammer-fields` but with full CRUD and changelog.

Views are **mutable** — users can create, modify, and delete them. Changes are logged with whole-view snapshot undo/redo.

## Key files
- `swissarmyhammer-views/Cargo.toml` — workspace crate
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/lib.rs` — pub mod types, context, changelog, error
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/types.rs` — ViewDef, ViewId, ViewKind, ViewCommandDef
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/context.rs` — ViewsContext with read/write/delete/list + from_yaml_sources()
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/changelog.rs` — ViewChangeEntry with whole-view snapshots, JSONL, undo/redo
- `swissarmyhammer-views/src/error.rs` — ViewsError, Result type alias

## ViewDef type
```rust
struct ViewDef {
    id: ViewId,                      // ULID
    name: String,                    // Human-facing
    icon: Option<String>,            // Lucide icon name
    kind: ViewKind,                  // Grid | Board
    entity_type: String,             // Which entity type this view shows
    card_fields: Option<Vec<String>>, // Fields to show on cards (board-specific)
    commands: Vec<ViewCommandDef>,   // Command metadata (data-driven)
}

struct ViewCommandDef {
    id: String,                      // Command ID (e.g. "board.newCard")
    name: String,                    // Human-readable name
    description: Option<String>,
    keys: Option<KeyBindings>,       // Per-keymap keybindings
}

struct KeyBindings {
    vim: Option<String>,
    cua: Option<String>,
    emacs: Option<String>,
}
```

Commands are data-driven: ViewDef declares command metadata (id, name, keys). React renderers attach execute functions at mount time by matching command id.

## ViewsContext
- `from_yaml_sources(writable_root, &[(&str, &str)])` — parse YAML, build name+id indexes
- `get_view_by_name()`, `get_view_by_id()`, `all_views()`
- `write_view(def)` — write YAML to disk, update indexes, append changelog (whole-view snapshot)
- `delete_view(id)` — remove file, update indexes, append changelog
- `undo(entry_id)` / `redo(entry_id)` — replay snapshots

## Checklist
- [ ] Create Cargo.toml with workspace deps
- [ ] Add to workspace Cargo.toml members
- [ ] Implement ViewDef, ViewId, ViewKind, ViewCommandDef, KeyBindings types with serde
- [ ] Implement ViewsContext with from_yaml_sources() and CRUD
- [ ] Implement ViewChangeEntry changelog with JSONL append/read
- [ ] Implement undo/redo via snapshot replay
- [ ] Implement error types
- [ ] Write tests: YAML parsing, write/delete round-trip, changelog, undo/redo, override merge
- [ ] cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-views passes
